title: MOTION TO DISMISS
subtitle: Parish Courthouse · 9:00 AM
epigraph_upright: Truth, balance, accountability, cause and effect.
epigraph_reversed: The verdict that arrives too late, the evidence that won't hold.
scene_description: The room is full. The case is on the docket. Anna is at the plaintiff table. Erica is on the bench.
direction_hint: Justice isn't who wins. It's what gets entered into the record.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at Parish Courthouse · 9:00 AM.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
